debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
μ ν : ComplexMeasure α
f : α → ℂ
⊢ ∫ (x : α),
      @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ (μ + ν) x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ (μ + ν) =
    ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ μ x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ μ +
      ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ ν x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ ν

failed_attempts:
cases hμν with | hl => rw [integral_undef hl, zero_add] | hr => rw [integral_undef hr, add_zero, integral_undef]
    contrapose! hμ
    have : (fun a ↦ f a * μ.rnDeriv λ a) =ᵐ[λ] (fun a ↦ f a * (μ + ν).rnDeriv λ a - f a * ν.rnDeriv λ a) := by
      filter_upwards [VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν λ] with x hx
      simp [hx, mul_add, add_sub_cancel_right]
    exact Integrable.congr hμ.sub_left hr this
